Name: GROUND_MATERIAL_PARAM
Description: Defines movement, sound, environmental, and interaction properties for a ground material type.

Fields.Name: Primary Material
Fields.Description: Primary ground material type used for physics, effects, and audio.

Fields.Name: Secondary Material
Fields.Description: Secondary or blended material type applied to the surface.

Fields.Name: Movement Speed Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting character movement speed on this surface.

Fields.Name: Turn Speed Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting character turning or rotation speed on this surface.

Fields.Name: Sound Level Offset
Fields.Description: Additional noise level generated while moving on this surface.

Fields.Name: Extinguishes Torch
Fields.Description: Determines whether entering this surface extinguishes the player's torch.

Fields.Name: Torch Extinguish Parameter ID
Fields.Description: Reference ID for torch extinguishing behavior settings.

Fields.Name: Water Surface
Fields.Description: Indicates whether this material is treated as water.

Fields.Name: Environment Type
Fields.Description: Defines the environmental category associated with this surface.

Fields.Name: Dodge Restriction Category
Fields.Description: Category controlling dodge movement limitations on this surface.

Fields.Name: Disable Idle Damage
Fields.Description: Prevents environmental damage while the character is standing still.

Fields.Name: Damage ID
Fields.Description: Reference ID for environmental damage applied by this surface.

Fields.Name: Water Landing SFX
Fields.Description: Particle effect ID played when falling into this surface.

Fields.Name: Light Roll Dodge Distance Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to dodge distance for light rolling on this surface.

Fields.Name: Light Step Dodge Distance Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to dodge distance for light step movement on this surface.

Fields.Name: Heavy Roll Dodge Distance Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to dodge distance for heavy rolling on this surface.

Fields.Name: Heavy Step Dodge Distance Multiplier
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to dodge distance for heavy step movement on this surface.

Fields.Name: Water Entry SFX Parameter ID
Fields.Description: Reference ID for splash and water-entry visual/audio effects.

Fields.Name: SFX ID 0
Fields.Description: Primary particle effect ID associated with this material.

Fields.Name: SFX ID 1
Fields.Description: Secondary particle effect ID associated with this material.

Fields.Name: SFX Duration
Fields.Description: Duration that the associated particle effects remain active.
